context.goal: Switch the document editor from view-only mode into text selection/editing mode.
context.cues: The TIAEditor window is open on page 1/15 showing the document title text on a white page, with the top toolbar in its initial compact view-only layout.

anchors.locator: top-left toolbar button labeled 'Text' with pen icon

procedure.expect: The text editing toolbar appears with Select, Insert, Change, Delete and related text tools; status bar indicates select text mode.
